raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 347 will reduce delays to ensure patients have access to medical treatment.",
    "AB 347 will help hundreds of thousands of patients, especially those with chronic conditions.",
    "Step therapy may require patients to try medications chosen by their health insurance company before receiving the medication recommended by their physician.",
    "Insurers do not always fully understand the specific issues involved in a patient’s condition.",
    "Delays in access to medications can worsen disease progression for people with arthritis.",
    "Delays in treatment can cause permanent damage and disability in patients with arthritis.",
    "Personalized, individual care is critical for people with arthritis.",
    "AB 347 will help thousands of arthritis sufferers.",
    "Step therapy can force patients to 'fail first' on ineffective medications, delaying access to effective treatment.",
    "AB 347 creates reasonable exceptions to the step therapy process.",
    "Getting the right medication at the right time is essential for treating Crohn’s disease or ulcerative colitis."
  ]
}
```
